title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Manufacturing Engineer to join our dynamic team in Agra. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises:
Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kansai Nerolac International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
